content.json:
## Abnormal Security Overview

This workbook summarizes email threats, account takeover cases, user-reported messages, and vendor cases ingested from the Abnormal Security CCF Push connector. Use the time range selector to adjust the reporting window.

content.query:
ABNORMAL_SECURITY_THREAT_LOG_CL
| summarize Threats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Threats detected over time

content.query:
ABNORMAL_SECURITY_THREAT_LOG_CL
| summarize Count = count() by AttackType = tostring(abx_body_abx_body_attack_type_s)
| where isnotempty(AttackType)
| sort by Count desc
| render piechart
content.title: Attacks by type

content.query:
ABNORMAL_SECURITY_THREAT_LOG_CL
| summarize Threats = count() by Recipient = tostring(abx_body_abx_body_recipient_address_s)
| where isnotempty(Recipient)
| sort by Threats desc
| take 10
content.title: Top targeted recipients

content.query:
ABNORMAL_SECURITY_ATO_CASE_CL
| summarize Cases = count() by Severity = tostring(abx_body_abx_body_severity_s)
| sort by Cases desc
content.title: Account Takeover cases by severity

content.query:
ABNORMAL_SECURITY_ABUSE_MAILBOX_CL
| where abx_body_abx_body_reported_b == true
| summarize Reports = count() by Judgement = tostring(abx_body_abx_body_judgement_s)
| sort by Reports desc
content.title: User-reported messages by judgement

content.query:
ABNORMAL_SECURITY_VENDOR_CASE_CL
| summarize Cases = count() by VendorDomain = tostring(abx_body_abx_body_vendorDomain_s)
| where isnotempty(VendorDomain)
| sort by Cases desc
| take 10
content.title: Vendor cases by domain
